test.note: 7 tests failed in apps/api/src/routes/__tests__/sunat-credentials.test.ts - these are backend-core integration tests, not sdk-cli. All SDK and CLI tests passed (246/253).

lint.note: Only 3 warnings about 'any' types, no errors

blockingIssues.description: SDK type mismatch: CreateComprobanteInput requires 'precioUnitario' but API expects 'valorUnitario' for totals calculation. SDK users would provide wrong field.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Change SDK to use 'valorUnitario' instead of 'precioUnitario' to match API expectation

blockingIssues.description: Type mismatch: API returns totalGravadas, totalIgv, totalImporte as strings (via toFixed(2)) but SDK types them as numbers
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Update Comprobante type to use string for these fields, or parse them in the SDK client

blockingIssues.description: SDK doesn't validate RUC format when clienteTipoDocumento is '6'. API validates this server-side but SDK should catch it client-side.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add client-side RUC validation when documento tipo is 6

blockingIssues.description: Uses 'as any' cast on line 45 of series.ts when calling client.series.list(options), violating AGENTS.md convention
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Remove the 'as any' cast - SDK returns properly typed ListSeriesResult

blockingIssues.description: Implementation is UNTRACKED in git. The commitId 9386409 only contains series commands, not emit commands
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Commit the emit.ts and emit.test.ts files

blockingIssues.description: Help text shows 'facturin emit factura' but actual command is 'facturin emit'. The word 'factura' is extraneous.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Fix help text to say 'facturin emit' instead of 'facturin emit factura'

blockingIssues.description: parseEmitCommand has tipoComprobante in return type but no --tipo-comprobante flag is parsed
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add --tipo-comprobante flag parsing or remove it from the return type

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the expected type for clienteDireccion - the SDK had to discover through trial and error that it should be string, not Record<string, unknown>
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature sdk-comprobantes-methods fixed clienteDireccion type from Record<string, unknown> to string

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add step to require comparing SDK types with actual API types (reading API schema/service files) before finalizing SDK type definitions
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: sdk-comprobantes-methods had type mismatches with API that weren't caught because worker only tested with mocks

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD guidance: CLI commands that require a live API should use integration tests with mocks, not traditional TDD unit tests
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cli-series-commands and cli-emit-command followed TDD procedure but no tests were added for series commands

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document RUC validation algorithm requirements - the SUNAT-specific validation (11 digits + checksum) is not documented
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: API has RUC validation in comprobantes.service.ts but AGENTS.md has no mention of it

preExistingTestFailures.description: 7 integration tests in apps/api/src/routes/__tests__/sunat-credentials.test.ts are failing. These tests belong to backend-core milestone, not sdk-cli. All SDK and CLI tests passed.
tests: VAL-API-012: should reject requests without username
VAL-API-012: should reject requests without password
VAL-API-013: should reject username shorter than 6 characters
VAL-API-013: should reject username longer than 20 characters
VAL-API-013: should reject username with special characters
VAL-API-015: should update SUNAT credentials and return success
VAL-API-016: should return 404 when tenant ID does not exist
preExistingTestFailures.note: These are pre-existing failures in backend-core. SDK and CLI tests for sdk-cli milestone all pass.
